name: Page Context Loader
description: A deterministic page-context reader that turns page operation context and page snapshots into an auditable context_package with source refs, budget metadata, and warnings.

inputSchema.name: Page Operation Context
inputSchema.description: Structured page operation context, usually containing page_operation_book and page_facts.

inputSchema.name: Page Context
inputSchema.description: Optional rendered page context text captured by the frontend.

inputSchema.name: Source Run ID
inputSchema.description: Optional graph run id associated with the page context.

outputSchema.name: Page Context Report
outputSchema.description: Page context sections, source refs, budget, and warnings.
